# YouTube to Markdown (Y2MD)

> Convert YouTube video captions/transcripts into clean Markdown files.

Y2MD is a web application at https://y2md.ponslink.com. Users paste a public YouTube URL and receive a downloadable Markdown document containing the video's transcript, optional timestamps, and video metadata.

## Core capabilities

- YouTube URL validation for youtube.com, youtu.be, shorts, and embed URLs.
- Transcript extraction using youtube-transcript-api and yt-dlp fallback.
- Automatic caption language detection.
- Markdown formatting with title, channel, source URL, extraction date, and timestamped sections.
- Download as .md or copy to clipboard.
- Progress UI with URL analysis, video metadata, transcript extraction, and Markdown conversion stages.

## Limitations

- Works best for public YouTube videos with captions or auto-captions.
- Videos without captions may not produce a transcript.
- YouTube may rate-limit or block some requests, especially from data-center IPs.
- No video or audio files are downloaded; only caption/transcript data is processed.

## API

POST /api/transcript
GET /api/languages/{video_id}
GET /api/health

## Suggested citation

YouTube to Markdown, Y2MD, https://y2md.ponslink.com
